title: Dropout Playground
tagline: Feel why silencing neurons regularizes — live masks, p-slider, ensemble view
summary: Slide the dropout probability p from 0 to 1 and watch a small network flicker. Every frame is a different sub-network. Over many frames you are training an exponential ensemble with shared weights — the core intuition behind the most influential regularizer of 2012.
highlights: Watch a live binary mask change every frame — different sub-network each batch.
Drag the dropout probability from 0.0 to 0.9 and see the connectivity thin out.
Toggle train vs eval mode — the second turns dropout off and re-scales nothing.
Count the kept-edge ratio live to verify 'inverted dropout' preserves expected activation.
Switch between three modes: masking a forward pass, ensembling 8 masks, and a thinned-network sketch.
